item.title: PUMA Rbd Game Sneaker uniseks-volwassene Puma White Puma White Puma Team Gold 42 EU
item.description: You can find PUMA Rbd Game Sneaker uniseks-volwassene Puma White Puma White Puma Team Gold 42 EU with a discount here: ℹ️: Rubberen tussenzool PUMA Formstrip aan de laterale en mediale zijden Gerecycled bovenwerk PUMA Cat-logo op de hiel Rubberen buitenzool 🛒 Buy it!!
